nodes.label: Meltano CLI
nodes.description: Command-line interface for managing ELT workflows, plugins, jobs, schedules, and data integration pipelines.

nodes.label: Meltano Core
nodes.description: Core framework including project management, plugin system, configuration, and environment services.

nodes.label: Plugin System
nodes.description: Extensible plugin architecture supporting Singer taps, targets, dbt transformers, utilities, and command plugins.

nodes.label: Singer Ecosystem
nodes.description: Singer taps (data sources) and targets (data destinations) for ELT operations.

nodes.label: dbt Integration
nodes.description: Data transformation framework integration for dbt projects and models.

nodes.label: Meltano System Database
nodes.description: System database for storing project state, job history, schedules, and configurations using Alembic migrations.

nodes.label: Project Configuration
nodes.description: Meltano.yml project files storing pipeline definitions, plugin configurations, and environment settings.

nodes.label: State Management
nodes.description: Manages pipeline execution state, bookmarking, and incremental loading with support for S3 storage.

nodes.label: Job Scheduler
nodes.description: Schedules and manages ELT job execution, runs, and workflow orchestration.

nodes.label: Logging & Monitoring
nodes.description: Comprehensive logging with structured logs, tracking, and observability support.

nodes.label: Meltano Hub
nodes.description: Registry service for discovering and installing 600+ pre-built plugins and integrations.

nodes.label: Environment Service
nodes.description: Manages environment variables, dotenv files, and configuration across different deployment contexts.

nodes.label: Validation Service
nodes.description: Validates schemas, configurations, and pipeline definitions against JSON schemas.

nodes.label: Documentation Site
nodes.description: Comprehensive documentation website built with Docusaurus.

summary: Meltano is a Python-based open-source ELT (Extract-Load-Transform) platform with a modular architecture centered around a CLI interface, core framework, and extensible plugin system. The system manages data pipelines by orchestrating Singer taps and targets for extraction/loading and integrating dbt for transformations, while maintaining state and configuration in a system database with comprehensive logging and environment management.
